calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-17-2026 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-27-2026 Continued To Mar-17-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Oct-21-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-18-2024 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Sep-18-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Karishma Patel appeared by zoom for Robert Purdy.
Stephanie Rothberg appeared by zoom for Patricia Vasconi and Mario Vasconi.

The court explained that it will be requiring a minimum bond as Mr. Purdy resides out of State. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated June 14, 2023, is admitted to probate. Robert A. Purdy is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for October 21, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Karen Ann Simons is appointed probate referee. The Petition for Letters of Administration is off calendar.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: G. Tan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
